Field.name: I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products RD
I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products Rep
I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products RVP
IsKit
Field.source: Formula: IF (CategoryGroupId == '70' OR (CategoryGroupId != '70' AND (FindString(UPPERCASE(SubcategoryDesc), 'KIT') != -1) OR (FindString(UPPERCASE(SubcategoryDesc), 'TRAY') != -1) OR (FindString(UPPERCASE(SubcategoryDesc), 'LAB PRESOURCE') != -1)) AND ((FindString(UPPERCASE(SubcategoryDesc), 'KITCHEN') == -1) ) AND (FindString(UPPERCASE(SubcategoryDesc), 'FOOD') == -1) AND (FindString(UPPERCASE(SubcategoryDesc), 'SURGICAL LAP MAYO TRAYS') == -1) AND (FindString(UPPERCASE(SubcategoryDesc), 'MAYO STANDS') == -1)) AND SubcategoryId NOT IN ('700K700001304','700E700010035','700K700001004','700E700010034','700N700010038','700K700001006') THEN 1 ELSE 0 ENDIF (BatchMacro)

Field.name: IsPerformancePlus
Field.source: Formula: if [SourceTypeId] = 'NBP' and [ExternalMaterialGroupDesc] = 'Preferred' then 1 else 0 endif (BatchMacro)

Field.name: Long Term Care RD Node ID
Long Term Care Rep Node ID
Long Term Care RVP Node ID

SelectField.field: I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products RD
I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products Rep
I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products RVP
Long Term Care RD Node ID
Long Term Care Rep Node ID
Long Term Care RVP Node ID
I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products RD
I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products Rep
I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products RVP
Long Term Care RD Node ID
Long Term Care Rep Node ID
Long Term Care RVP Node ID
I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products RD
I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products Rep
I.S. Non Acute Exclusive Products RVP
Long Term Care RD Node ID
Long Term Care Rep Node ID
Long Term Care RVP Node ID

Configuration.File: odbc:DSN=Prod - MasterProduction|||select AnalyticsGateway.dbo.MaterialMaster.MaterialId, AnalyticsGateway.dbo.MaterialMaster.UnspscId, AnalyticsGateway.dbo.MaterialMaster.SourceTypeId as SourceTypeId from AnalyticsGateway.dbo.MaterialMaster where SourceTypeId = 'PBP' or SourceTypeID = 'SMP'

Field.name: MaterialId
Field.source: File: odbc:DSN=Prod - MasterProduction|||select AnalyticsGateway.dbo.MaterialMaster.MaterialId, AnalyticsGateway.dbo.MaterialMaster.UnspscId, AnalyticsGateway.dbo.MaterialMaster.SourceTypeId as SourceTypeId from AnalyticsGateway.dbo.MaterialMaster where SourceTypeId = 'PBP' or SourceTypeID = 'SMP'

Field.name: UnspscId
Field.source: File: odbc:DSN=Prod - MasterProduction|||select AnalyticsGateway.dbo.MaterialMaster.MaterialId, AnalyticsGateway.dbo.MaterialMaster.UnspscId, AnalyticsGateway.dbo.MaterialMaster.SourceTypeId as SourceTypeId from AnalyticsGateway.dbo.MaterialMaster where SourceTypeId = 'PBP' or SourceTypeID = 'SMP'

Field.name: SourceTypeId
Field.source: File: odbc:DSN=Prod - MasterProduction|||select AnalyticsGateway.dbo.MaterialMaster.MaterialId, AnalyticsGateway.dbo.MaterialMaster.UnspscId, AnalyticsGateway.dbo.MaterialMaster.SourceTypeId as SourceTypeId from AnalyticsGateway.dbo.MaterialMaster where SourceTypeId = 'PBP' or SourceTypeID = 'SMP'

Configuration.File: odbc:DSN=Prod - MasterProduction|||select AnalyticsGateway.dbo.VerticalSalesTransactionSalesData.MaterialId, AnalyticsGateway.dbo.VerticalSalesTransactionSalesData.YearMonth, AnalyticsGateway.dbo.VerticalSalesTransactionSalesData.Sales from AnalyticsGateway.dbo.VerticalSalesTransactionSalesData where AnalyticsGateway.dbo.VerticalSalesTransactionSalesData.Sales > 0.00 and YearMonth > '202206'

Field.name: MaterialId
Field.source: File: odbc:DSN=Prod - MasterProduction|||select AnalyticsGateway.dbo.VerticalSalesTransactionSalesData.MaterialId, AnalyticsGateway.dbo.VerticalSalesTransactionSalesData.YearMonth, AnalyticsGateway.dbo.VerticalSalesTransactionSalesData.Sales from AnalyticsGateway.dbo.VerticalSalesTransactionSalesData where AnalyticsGateway.dbo.VerticalSalesTransactionSalesData.Sales > 0.00 and YearMonth > '202206'

Field.name: YearMonth
Field.source: File: odbc:DSN=Prod - MasterProduction|||select AnalyticsGateway.dbo.VerticalSalesTransactionSalesData.MaterialId, AnalyticsGateway.dbo.VerticalSalesTransactionSalesData.YearMonth, AnalyticsGateway.dbo.VerticalSalesTransactionSalesData.Sales from AnalyticsGateway.dbo.VerticalSalesTransactionSalesData where AnalyticsGateway.dbo.VerticalSalesTransactionSalesData.Sales > 0.00 and YearMonth > '202206'

Field.name: Sales
Field.source: File: odbc:DSN=Prod - MasterProduction|||select AnalyticsGateway.dbo.VerticalSalesTransactionSalesData.MaterialId, AnalyticsGateway.dbo.VerticalSalesTransactionSalesData.YearMonth, AnalyticsGateway.dbo.VerticalSalesTransactionSalesData.Sales from AnalyticsGateway.dbo.VerticalSalesTransactionSalesData where AnalyticsGateway.dbo.VerticalSalesTransactionSalesData.Sales > 0.00 and YearMonth > '202206'

Field.name: TRAILING_TWELVE
Field.source: Formula: if [RecordID] <= 12 then 1 elseif [RecordID] <= 24 then 2 elseif [RecordID] <= 36 then 3 elseif [RecordID] <= 48 then 4 elseif [RecordID] <= 60 then 5 elseif [RecordID] <= 72 then 6 else 7 endif

Field.name: YEAR_TO_DATE
Field.source: Formula: if [RecordID] <= 12 then 1 elseif [RecordID] <= 24 then 2 elseif [RecordID] <= 36 then 3 elseif [RecordID] <= 48 then 4 elseif [RecordID] <= 60 then 5 elseif [RecordID] <= 72 then 6 else 7 endif

Field.name: HAS_CUSTOMER_VIOLATION
Field.source: Formula: if IsNull([DIST_TOT_UNITS]) then 1 elseif [DIST_TOT_UNITS] = 0 then 1 else 0 endif
